title: cracca rhodantha
intro: Cracca rhodantha, also known as the red wisteria, is a climbing legume plant native to South Africa. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Cracca rhodantha is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, and can be found in some traditional medicine products in its natural form or in standardized extracts.
